channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Tech workers in Kenya hold vigil for TikTok content moderator who died
item.description: Technology workers in Kenya have held a vigil for a colleague who died in unclear circumstances after she was unable to travel to her home in Nigeria for two years.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: Better data, not a review, new systems will fix acquisition
item.description: President Donald Trump is charging DOGE and agencies to look at contracting processes, procedures and the systems that support those efforts by late March. The post Better data, not a review, new systems will fix acquisition first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: TikTok Flooded with Christian Messages: A Mysterious Trend
item.description: A wave of copy-pasted Christian messages has taken over TikTok's comment sections, leaving users questioning the origin and purpose behind it.
item.dc:creator: Eve Upton-Clark, Fast Company

item.title: Chinese cyberespionage group deploys custom backdoors on Juniper routers
item.description: A Chinese cyberespionage group with a history of exploiting proprietary network-edge devices and developing custom malware for them has also been targeting enterprise and ISP-grade Juniper MX Series routers, according to a report by Google’s Mandiant team.
item.dc:creator: csoonline

item.title: Apple faces UK antitrust threat as regulator targets browsers
item.description: Apple faces a renewed threat in the UK, where a new report from the top antitrust regulator says both it and Google are holding back innovation in the mobile browser market. By far, most of the criticism is being leveled at Apple.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Arista delivers intelligent load balancing, AI job-centric observability
item.description: Arista Networks has added load balancing and AI job-centric observability features to core software products in an effort to help enterprise customers grow and effectively manage AI networked environments.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: FTC asks judge to delay Amazon trial due to resource constraints
item.description: A lawyer for the Federal Trade Commission says the agency needs to seek a trial delay in a case against Amazon due to staffing and budgetary challenges.
item.dc:creator: Haleluya Hadero, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: GTA Online publisher Take-Two is gunning for a black market that’s basically heaven for cheaters
item.description: Take-Two is going after online marketplace PlayerAuctionsfor allegedly selling hacked GTA Online accounts and currency.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: OpenAI takes on rivals with new Responses API, Agents SDK
item.description: OpenAI’s new Responses API and an upgraded Agents SDK will help enterprises more easily build agents with advanced reasoning and multimodal capabilities, the company said Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Performance isn't the only reason you should buy Apple's M3 Ultra Mac Studio - it's reportedly one of the most power-efficient processors too
item.description: Apple's M3 Ultra is the fastest M-series chip yet, and its power efficiency is better than most popular desktop CPUs.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Johnson says Congress will investigate attacks against Tesla owners, vehicles
item.description: Speaker Mike Johnson (R-La.) said Wednesday that Congress will investigate attacks against Tesla vehicles and their owners as Elon Musk’s flagship electric vehicle company faces mounting backlash over its CEO’s controversial role in the Trump administration’s cost-cutting initiatives.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, The Hill

item.title: Aptori Now on Google Cloud Marketplace for AI-Powered Security and Automated Risk Remediation
item.description: Aptori’s AI-Driven AppSec Platform Proactively Eliminates Vulnerabilities to Minimize Risk and Ensure Compliance.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: The Fascinating World of WebAssembly
item.description: Discover the potential of WebAssembly and how it's changing the game for developers.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: FinOps breaks out of the cloud
item.description: FinOps finally became ubiquitous across the enterprise landscape last year with 75% of Forbes’ Global 2000 companies now all-in, according to IDC.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Altera targets low-latency AI edge applications with new FPGA products
item.description: Altera has introduced the latest family of Agilex FPGAs, along with Quartus Prime Pro software, and FPGA AI Suite to enable the rapid development of highly customized embedded systems for use in robotics, factory automation systems, and medical equipment.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Trump buys Tesla to 'make a statement' about Musk backlash
item.description: President Trump said Tuesday he was buying a Tesla vehicle as he doubled down on his support of Elon Musk, who has come under mounting scrutiny for leading the Trump administration's government cost initiatives. "I'm going to buy because number one, it's a great product. As good as it gets.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Trump says TikTok deal is in the works. Here's where things stand with the company
item.description: In less than a month, TikTok could have one or a few new owners, be banned again, or simply receive another reprieve to continue operating in the United States.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: South Dakota pushes labels for political deepfake videos ahead of elections
item.description: South Dakota lawmakers have approved legislation that would impose criminal and civil penalties on those who try to use unlabeled deepfakes to influence voters in the state, with the law now awaiting signature from Gov. Larry Rhoden.
item.dc:creator: Elizabeth Crisp, The Hill

item.title: Windows 11: A guide to the updates
item.description: A Windows launch isn’t the end a process — it’s really just the beginning. Microsoft continually works on improving Windows 11 by fixing bugs, releasing security patches, and occasionally adding new features.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Elon Musk claims X being targeted in 'massive cyberattack' as service goes down
item.description: Hours after a series of outages Monday that left X unavailable to thousands of users, Elon Musk claimed that the social media platform was being targeted in a “massive cyberattack.” “We get attacked every day, but this was done with a lot of resources," Musk claimed in a post.
item.dc:creator: MICHELLE CHAPMAN and BARBARA ORTUTAY, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Is that iPhone app spying? Apple’s App Privacy Report reveals all
item.description: Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson urges you to use Apple’s App Privacy Report to see what your apps are really up to.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Utah becomes the first state to pass legislation requiring app stores to verify ages
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) — Utah on Wednesday became the first state to pass legislation requiring app stores to verify users’ ages and get parental consent for minors to download apps to their devices. The bill headed to the desk of Gov.
item.dc:creator: HANNAH SCHOENBAUM, Associated Press, PIX 11
